contact.title: Contact me
contact.subtitle: Got a project, an idea, or just curious? Reach out — I'm always happy to connect, collaborate, and bring new digital experiences to life.
contact.heading: Let's build something together
contact.body:
I'm a front-end developer with a strong focus on architectural quality and technical complexity.

I'm drawn to well-structured, ambitious projects where there's room to think deeply about performance, scalability, and long-term maintainability. I choose my collaborations carefully: I look for projects with a clear direction, solid purpose, and a thoughtful approach to what's being built both technically and conceptually.

If you're working on something structured and challenging, we might be a good fit.

about.title: About me
about.intro: What excites me most about Frontend Development is the chance to bring ideas to life — to turn abstract concepts into intuitive, beautiful, and high-performance interfaces. Each project is an opportunity to refine details, explore new solutions, and create something that feels smooth and meaningful for the user.
about.journeyHeading: My journey into technology began with a simple curiosity that grew into a deep passion for coding and design
about.journeyBody: During my years at the University of Milan, I not only strengthened my technical knowledge but also discovered the value of collaboration and creative problem-solving.
about.angularBody: I build with Angular, focusing on modular architecture, predictable state management, and reusable components that stay clean even as projects grow. My goal is to create codebases that scale smoothly, remain easy to understand, and avoid unnecessary complexity over time. On the development side, I care about structure and consistency: components are designed to be flexible, maintainable, and ready to adapt to different needs without breaking the overall system. Design plays an equally important role in my work. I focus on intentional layouts, balanced spacing, and clear visual hierarchy to build interfaces that feel coherent and easy to navigate.
about.architectureBody: Architecture comes before features — I focus on building solid foundations with modular structures, maintainable patterns, and predictable systems that remain clear as projects grow. From frontend organization to backend integration, every layer is designed to work cohesively and evolve without introducing unnecessary complexity. I approach development with a full-picture mindset: reusable components, structured APIs, efficient data flow, and backend-aware decisions that improve stability and long-term maintainability. Performance remains a core principle, with lean bundles, optimized loading, and code that earns its place in the build.
about.drawing:
Drawing has always been my favorite way to express ideas, long before I ever wrote a line of code. That passion for visual storytelling gradually evolved into a love for digital design.

Today, as a frontend developer, I find true fulfillment in translating creative concepts into functional and engaging user interfaces.

Implementing design is where my artistic sensibility meets my technical mindset, allowing me to craft experiences that are not only beautiful but also intuitive and user-focused.
about.ctaBody:
Maybe you like me, maybe you don't — but if you've scrolled this far, something must've caught your eye.

Code, components, and a strong dislike for spaghetti code. Grab my CV. No clichés. Just real stuff.
